error_display.title: Oops, Something's Fishy
error_display.message: It appears that an unexpected issue has occurred. We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try again later or refresh the page. If the problem persists, feel free to contact our support team for assistance.

result.analysis: Etap APF blocked the POST request to /api/chat by closing the connection (ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED). Mistral frontend caught the network error and displayed its own error page (error code 6002) instead of showing the APF warning text. The APF warning response was not rendered — Mistral's error handler intercepted the connection failure before any response body could be displayed.
recommendations: Connection close triggers Mistral's own error handler (error 6002), preventing APF warning display
Need to send a proper HTTP response instead of closing connection — investigate envelope/response template for Mistral
Capture SSE response format via request #258 (har-capture with non-sensitive prompt) to design proper warning injection
